title: Rich Earthy Canadian Sardine Pasta
description: A hearty and flavorful Canadian dish featuring sardines, perfect for a date night, with earthy and Mediterranean-friendly flavors. This recipe combines the richness of sardines with the comfort of pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the white wine and chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Stir in the chopped sardines and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sardine and mushroom mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the chopped parsley and grated parmesan cheese.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
